title: vilfa divaricata var. pumila
intro: Vilfa divaricata var. pumila, also known as dwarf hairgrass or small vilfa, is a low-growing, perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vilfa divaricata var. pumila include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
